name: Google Fi
description: Mobile virtual network operator from Google offering cellular plans, eSIM activation, international data and smartwatch connectivity.

years.notes: Original Project Fi mark at launch. Stylized lowercase 'fi' built from overlapping pills: green vertical stem (#00A365), cyan horizontal crossbar (#00B7D5), yellow body of 'i' (#F0B21C) and a white tittle disc on the crossbar. Cropped out of the full 'Project Fi' lockup SVG (Wayback Machine, Jan 2017 snapshot of fi.google.com).

Google Fi Wireless rebrand (Apr 19, 2023). Inverted-staircase 'F' icon: four horizontal pills (blue, green, yellow, red) stacked top-to-bottom with descending lengths, each terminated by an overlapping darker-shade circle, evoking signal bars. Cropped out of the full 'Google Fi Wireless' wordmark SVG (Wikimedia Commons).

notes: 2018 'Google Fi' (post-'Project Fi') millésime intentionally omitted: only a 512×512 raster of the icon-only mark could be located and no `raster-to-svg` vectorizer is available in this repo. Defer until an official SVG or trustworthy vectorization is sourced.
